enrichment.summary: Kyle records a vlog from Boulder on January 15th, 2017, around 6:20am after a disrupted sleep schedule. He talks about working on his website doing cleanup and standardization work, listening to history podcasts (Fall of Rome, History Chicks covering Mary Queen of Scots and Catherine the Great) while waiting on slow copy-paste tasks, and mentions plans to sell his car.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: His newer computer is dramatically faster, making website tasks that used to take forever now go by quickly
He's in the finishing/standardization stage and it's going faster than expected
Wants to listen to all 120 episodes while doing the current website work
